CARLA DQN Experiment Configuration
==================================

CARLA Version: 0.9.14

Experiments:
1. Epsilon Greedy
2. Median First
3. Median 50
4. Ensemble

Algorithm:
DQN + RND + Count-Based Exploration
Target Network
Replay Buffer
Adam Optimizer

Training Episodes: 500
Testing Episodes: 300
Maximum Episode Steps: 500

Learning Rate: 5e-5
Epsilon: 0.2
Gamma: 0.99
Batch Size: 64
Replay Capacity: 50000
Target Update Interval: 1000

RND Beta: 0.01
RND Learning Rate: 1e-4
RND Output Size: 64

Count Beta: 0.05
Count State Bin Size: 1.0

Realistic Traffic: Enabled
Traffic Vehicles: 2
Pedestrians: 2

Device: CUDA
Seed: 42
Convergence Threshold: 0.95
Convergence Window: 10
